description: This node provides information provided by HTC Vive wand controllers.

fields.User: The user we are getting controller information from.
fields.Node: The controller side to get information from.
fields.IsActive: Is this controller actively being used right now.
fields.BatteryLevel: The battery level of this controller.
fields.Grip: Is the controller's grip clicked down right now.
fields.App: Is the app button pressed right now.
fields.Trigger: The amount of how far this controller's trigger is being pressed down currently.
fields.TriggerHair: Is the controller's trigger hair being used right now.
fields.TriggerClick: Is the controller's trigger being clicked down right now.
fields.Touchpad: The position of this controller's touchpad.
fields.TouchpadTouch: Is the controller's touchpad being touched right now.
fields.TouchpadClick: Is the controller's touchpad clicked down right now.
